---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in AI Agent Guard
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug, needs-info
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS & Architecture | e.g. macOS 14.4.1 (Apple Silicon M3) |
| AI Agent Guard Version | e.g. v0.1.0 |
| Claude Code Version | e.g. 1.2.3 (run `claude --version`) |
| Installation Method | e.g. DMG / Homebrew / built from source |

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open AI Agent Guard
2. Configure '...'
3. Run Claude Code with '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages, dialogs, or unexpected output.

## Screenshots / Screen Recording

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem.

## Log Output

Please attach the relevant log file. Logs are located at:
- **macOS/Linux**: `~/.config/ai-agent-guard/logs/`
- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\com.aigentguard.app\logs\`

```
Paste relevant log lines here
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. For example:
- Does the issue happen consistently or intermittently?
- Does it happen with all Claude Code commands or only specific ones?
- Did it work before a recent update?
